items.title: Persist to Drive
items.avoid: Relying on the VM's local disk for anything important.
items.prefer: Mount Drive and checkpoint outputs there.

items.title: Secrets for keys
items.example: Add the secret once in the left sidebar (🔑 Secrets), then `userdata.get('OPENAI_API_KEY')` — the actual value never appears in the notebook file.

items.title: Plan for resets
items.prefer: Keep a setup cell that re-installs and re-mounts each session.
items.example:
```python
# Cell 1: setup (always run first)
%pip install -q langchain openai
from google.colab import drive; drive.mount('/content/drive')
```

items.title: Verify hardware
items.prefer: Set the runtime and check nvidia-smi/torch.cuda.
items.why: Prevents silently running heavy work on CPU.
items.example:
```python
import torch
assert torch.cuda.is_available(), 'GPU not attached — change runtime type!'
print(torch.cuda.get_device_name(0))
```
